name: 30 Floors of Madness
short_description: You are a former patient of an abandoned asylum, waking up on the 30th floor. To escape, descend all the floors by detecting anomalies using your observation and memory. Correct choices reduce the remaining floors, but mistakes are unforgivable. Can you escape?
detailed_description:
Story:
You are a former patient of an abandoned asylum. You wake up on the 30th floor of this strange environment. Your goal is to descend all the floors to reach the exit door and escape. As a former patient, you suffer from hallucinations. You will need to use your sense of observation and memory to detect anomalies.

Objective:
If you are hallucinating, take the staircase marked by a bloody handprint. If you are not hallucinating, take the other staircase. If your judgment is correct, the number of floors to descend will decrease, but any mistake will be unforgiving.

Will you be able to help this former asylum patient escape this sinister place?

Other:
There are 30 floors and 50 anomalies.
This game can be played solo or with two players.
You have a checkpoint after passing 15 floors.
